author: parithosh
content: I've approved #11853, is it worth approving #11855 already though?  or are there more changes to #11855 worth waiting for?

author: jochembrouwer
content:
PR 11855 promotes the EIP from Draft to Review status and it is not recommended to do other changes on such status change PRs (I flagged this in 11853 which is why the status change got removed from there)
Approving it now will not merge the PR as the CI is failing: all referenced EIPs should at least have status Review (or better). 
This implicitly means that DFI section has to be removed (or all EIPs in DFI are at least in Review, which is something we cannot realistically expect from DFId EIPs for this fork)
Once approved it will merge once CI passes, so it would work the same as approving a "normal PR" (with a message like: LGTM, CI fails, please fix that and then we can merge)
Suggestion to approve if you agree with moving to Review status, this speeds up the process, once CI passes we can merge instead of waiting for author approval first 🙂
Thanks 😄

author: jochembrouwer
content: BTW, PR 11853 removes the CFI header, is this correct, are all EIPs in SFI?

author: jochembrouwer
content: I think it might be a mistake, have a PR here to re-add CFI and to restore EIP-8136/EIP-8189 stat https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11917
